text.title: Launch Readiness Review Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema draft-07 for the report artefact this methodology produces, with valid and invalid examples plus forbidden patterns.

example.note: launch_date not ISO; gates missing 7 of 8; status not in enum; owner empty; criterion too short; decision invalid; snapshots empty.

list.item: gates missing any of the 8 required gate keys (incomplete coverage).
any gate without a named owner (un-owned gates fail).
snapshots fewer than 3 entries (must cover T-7/T-3/T-1).
qualitative criterion text shorter than 10 chars ('looks ok').
